concepts/agents.title: Agents
concepts/agents.description: Agents are the participants in your market. Every entity that creates, exchanges, or consumes value is modeled as an agent.

concepts/agreements.title: Agreements
concepts/agreements.description: Agreements formalize the rules, terms, and commitments between market participants.

concepts/channels.title: Channels
concepts/channels.description: Channels describe how market participants reach each other and through which mediums exchanges occur.

concepts/exchanges.title: Exchanges
concepts/exchanges.description: Exchanges represent transactions between market participants. They are the primary mechanism through which value changes hands.

concepts/offerings.title: Offerings
concepts/offerings.description: Offerings package one or more values into a purchasable bundle with pricing.

concepts/tensions.title: Tensions
concepts/tensions.description: Tensions represent gaps between the current state and a desired future state. They are the driving force behind market evolution and exchange.

concepts/value-streams.title: Value Streams
concepts/value-streams.description: Value streams are the backbone of a Marketlum market. They represent the end-to-end flows through which value is created and delivered to market participants.

concepts/values.title: Values
concepts/values.description: Values represent what is created, exchanged, and consumed in your market. They are the fundamental unit of worth.

getting-started/project-structure.title: Project Structure
getting-started/project-structure.description: Marketlum is organized as a pnpm monorepo with the following structure:

getting-started/quickstart.title: Quickstart
getting-started/quickstart.description: This guide walks you through seeding sample data and exploring the Marketlum UI.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: Marketlum is an open-source framework for building markets. It provides the foundational building blocks for modeling value creation, exchange, and governance between market participants.
